author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Decision: The simplest and most impactful change is modifying GpuDevice::stream() to call current_stream_or_default() instead of always returning the stored default stream. This makes ALL existing kernel launch code stream-aware without changing any call sites. Also need to initialize the stream pool on device creation, and expose set_stream/with_stream at the GpuBackend trait level for ferrotorch-core callers.
